name: Gene Page
abstract: Eugene Edgar Page Jr. (September 13, 1939 – August 24, 1998) was an American conductor, composer, arranger and record producer, most active from the mid-1960s through the mid-1980s.

about_quotes.speaker: Buckingham
about_quotes.evidence: There was a great arranger in L.A. named Gene Page... I had a ten o’clock date in L.A. It was a big string date... I said, “Gene Page.”
